incidents.title: Checkout timeouts in EU region
incidents.description: Timeout rate increased after deployment deploy-1405.
incidents.customer_impact: EU customers may be unable to complete checkout.
comments: Traffic shifted away from one unhealthy instance.

incidents.title: Delayed invoice exports
incidents.description: Invoice export queue is processing twenty minutes behind schedule.
incidents.customer_impact: Exports are delayed but no data is lost.

incidents.title: Checkout cache saturation resolved
incidents.description: A cache shard reached capacity and was replaced.
incidents.customer_impact: Some requests were slower for eight minutes.
